description.from: Rapidly stabs the enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG. Upon a Crit Hit, stacks 1 Wound and resets cooldown. Per every stacked Wound, DMG dealt by Float Like a Butterfly is increased by 20%. Gains immunity to all DMG while the skill is in use.
description.to: Quickly stabs the enemy, dealing 277*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+160.5% ATK as Physical DMG. On a Critical Hit, applies [Wound] 1 stack and resets the cooldown. This skill’s DMG is increased by 20% per stack of [Wound].

description.from: Dispels negative effects from self and increases ATK by ??? for 20 sec and increases Crit Chance by 500. This effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Removes harmful effects from self and increases ATK by 205*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Critical Hit Chance by 500 for 15sec.

description.from: Inflicts ??? P.DMG upon enemy with a continuous attack. The last hit blows the enemy away.
description.to: Performs a series of attacks, dealing 126*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+72.3% ATK Physical Damage 9 times, then finishes with a powerful thrust that deals 1132*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))651.5% ATK Physical Damage and knocks the enemy far away. The damage of this skill is increased by 20% per [Wound] stack, and all [Wound] stacks are consumed on the final hit.

description.from: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK is increased by ??? for 10 sec. Can be stacked up to 8 times max.
description.to: On a Critical Hit, increases ATK by 40*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) for 10sec. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1 and Wound stack max is changed to 10. Deals 150% of ATK as extra DMG to enemies with 10 Wounds.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the maximum number of [Wound Stacks] is increased to 10.

dark.from: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, Crit Chance effect is changed to a 100% Crit DMG boost. Also gains a 25% DMG boost towards Bosses.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the Critical Hit Chance increase effect is replaced with an effect that increases Critical Damage by 65%, and damage dealt to bosses is increased by 30%.

dark.from: When holding 5 stacks, takes 20% reduced DMG.

description.from: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's P.Block chance by 500 for 10 sec.
description.to: [Float Like a Butterfly] Increases DMG by {0}%, and reduces the target's P.Block Chance by 500 for 10 sec.

description.from: [Shooting Star] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon Crit Hit, mana is recovered by 200.
description.to: [Shooting Star] Increases DMG by {0}%, and adds 1 Wound per attack.

dark.from: Upon using a Skill, increases own Crit DMG by 10% for 10 sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.
dark.to: When using a skill, has a 10% chance to increase your Critical Damage by 7%. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.from: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by {0} and Crit DMG is increased by {1}% for 15 sec. Can be stacked up to 5 times max.
description.to: Each time a Critical Hit occurs, for 15 sec own Attack Speed is increased by {0} and Critical Damage is increased by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 8 times.
